name: R55 locked full supplied-class embedding census v2
hypothesis: all induced fixed-core pullbacks over 328 supplied graphs and 328 complements can be exhaustively reconciled by two independent implementations under the aggregate per-host gate
expected_signal: 656 canonical host receipts with exact bitset/VF2 mapping and vector-stream agreement, bounded host times, and a hash-addressed compressed manifest
decision_value: decides whether complete supplied-class boundary blocks exist, creates a reusable exact corpus, and supplies the prerequisite evidence for a bounded residual-SAT discriminator

efficiency_design.naive_cost: For each of 656 labelled order-42 hosts, scan all 42P30 injections of the fixed induced core and every tied residual-row ordering. That direct space is infeasible.
opportunities_considered: Symmetry and canonical augmentation: retain the fixed labelled core and row-lex residual order, expanding every tied-row orbit so quotient coverage is exact.
Bitsets and incremental evaluation: use adjacency bitsets, most-constrained DFS branching, forward degree constraints, and a sound Hall-union prune.

Memoization and reusable prefixes: reuse parsed core/host structures per segment; do not memoize DFS states until labelled-map multiplicity preservation is proved; reserve learned clauses for residual SAT.
Decomposition and resumability: isolate each supplied host/complement into an atomic checkpointed segment, with fresh v2 paths that cannot mix with the rejected 49-host calibration prefix.
Compressed streamed artifacts: write one gzip host artifact plus an fsync'd JSONL manifest with exact mapping/vector stream hashes.
Independent coverage: reconcile the custom bitset enumerator with NetworkX VF2 on every host and reject any count, map-stream, vector-stream, or exact-vector disagreement.
efficiency_design.chosen_reductions: A hash-locked wrapper verifies the runner, both imported enumerators, and corpus; the runner enforces a 30-second aggregate host gate across both independent implementations; the corpus is segmented by host with compressed hash-addressed outputs and atomic checkpoints.
efficiency_design.expected_throughput_gain: The fresh local host-0 canary completed in 15.149 seconds with exact dual-stream agreement, versus an infeasible 42P30 scan. The first live host-0 pilot remeasures the deployed path before continuation.
efficiency_design.soundness_basis: The wrapper fails closed on any protected-input hash or committed-content mismatch. The two implementations must agree on embedding count, exact mapping-stream SHA-256, vector occurrences, unique-vector count, vector-stream SHA-256, and exact unique vectors. The corpus hash and 328+328 coverage remain independently checked.
efficiency_design.remains_uncompressed: All 328 supplied hosts and their 328 complements, every induced embedding, and every tied-row variant remain in scope. The supplied corpus is not quotient-deduplicated. Residual SAT remains a separate post-census discriminator and cannot use a partial block set.

progress.message: reconciled 92/656 hosts with exact stream agreement
